title: Bridge Essay: Biophysics of Evolution of Intellectual Systems.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Biophysics, of, Evolution, of, Intellectual.

**Biophysics of Evolution of Intellectual Systems.** — Biophysics (Oxf). PMID: 35789557. DOI: 10.1134/S0006350922020051. The first work on noogenesis as evolution of intellect was published 150 years ago. However, it was not until the 21st century that quantitation became possible for certain parameters that contribute to the understanding of the evolution of intellectual systems in natural sciences, the progress being due to basic achievements in physics, biology, medicine, and interdisciplinary fields. Analyses of the parameters of intellectual systems, patterns of their emergence and evolution, distinctive feat
